slides.hook: AI builds sales workflows — no coding needed
slides.body: SalesCloser secured a U.S. patent for its graph-based AI system. It builds conversational AI workflows for sales, eliminating the need for traditional coding. This marks a significant step in AI-driven automation.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout, black and white base with blue accent. Left-aligned text, structured elements.
slides.source_topic_headline: Daily 'AI for Work' Pulse: 3rd of May
